question: Explore developer details
title: Explore developer details
summary: You understand the project. Now explore only what you need.

scenes.headline: You understand the project. Now explore only what you need.
scenes.body: Open a question below for curated guidance assembled from the repository knowledge files. The complete technical reference remains available when you need the full articles.

entries.question: I want to change how ideas are saved

points.title: Ideas CRUD owns the lifecycle
points.text: Create, edit, list, and delete flows live in the application entry scripts and templates—not in an auth or upload layer.

points.title: Validate, write, redirect, read
points.text: POST handlers validate required fields, write with prepared statements, and redirect to a safe GET that reloads records.

points.title: Keep paths aligned
points.text: Any change to saved fields must update write statements, read statements, and templates together.

entries.question: I want to add a new idea field

points.title: Start with a manual migration
points.text: Author SQL, apply it on each environment, then confirm create and edit still work.

points.title: Touch every surface
points.text: Migration, create form, edit form, write path, read path, and display must all agree.

points.title: Watch schema drift
points.text: “It works on my machine” often means the local SQLite file already has columns production lacks.

entries.question: I want to add user accounts

points.title: Login alone is unsafe
points.text: A password form without ownership fields and filtered queries creates a false multi-user product.

points.title: Ship identity and ownership together
points.text: Users, ownership on ideas, queries filtered by owner, and create paths that stamp ownership must land together.

points.title: Until then, multi-user is out of scope
points.text: Anyone who can reach the URL can use the app today; host controls gate access.

entries.question: I am debugging a blank page

points.title: Check the database file first
points.text: Confirm existence, permissions, and a simple SELECT before rewriting templates.

points.title: Empty is normal
points.text: Zero rows is a valid empty state—not necessarily a routing failure.

points.title: Schema mismatch after deploy
points.text: Missing columns can throw and leave the page looking blank depending on error display.

points.title: Treat migration as part of deploy
points.text: Apply schema SQL on the server in the same change that ships new code.

points.title: Permissions matter
points.text: The SQLite file and its directory must be readable (and writable for saves) by the PHP user.

points.title: Verify end to end
points.text: After deploy, create and edit one idea once on production.

entries.question: I need the complete technical reference

points.title: Full articles live in the knowledge tree
points.text: Important files, decisions, assumptions, warnings, risks, debugging guides, glossary, and editorial history remain in `.vibekb/` and are published as the technical reference.

scenes.label: Complete technical reference
scenes.intro: Secondary to this guide. Use when you need the full structured articles.
